quest.03E48CD6E5DB806F.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Wyrmwright&r.

Work with them to unlock the &dDraconic Energy&r upgrade for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo wyrmwright&7.
quest.03E48CD6E5DB806F.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d飛龍傳人之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&d龍族能量&r升級吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo wyrmwright&7」。

quest.0CE3C7A6DE787371.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.0CE3C7A6DE787371.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.0EAEEF79436FDFA7.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.0EAEEF79436FDFA7.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.0F48353EDD296510.quest_desc.original: Speak to &dThe Wyrmwright&r once you have crafted the &dResonant Void&r and they will show you how to install this &3World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.0F48353EDD296510.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出了&d迴盪虛空&r後，是時候該回訪&d飛龍傳人&r，並向他學習該如何安裝這項&3世界引擎升級&r了。

quest.14537A63D3BDC09B.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.14537A63D3BDC09B.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.15DE76B303680F79.quest_desc.original:
The &dWyrmwright&r knows a lot about dragons. At this point, you should have some &dDraconic Dust&r.

That's dragon dust right?

Return to the &dEcho of The Wyrmwright&r once you've made a few draconic items to find out how to install this &3Upgrade&r.
quest.15DE76B303680F79.quest_desc.translation:
&d飛龍傳人&r知曉許多龍族的知識。事實上，你現在應該擁有一些&d龍塵&r。

先不管那是不是從龍身上掉下來的，至少它是龍塵，對吧？

當你做出一些龍族物品後，返回&d飛龍傳人&r處，並學習該如何安裝這項&3升級&r。

quest.1E077BC4B8832C98.quest_desc.original: Found within the upper levels of the &bTwilight Forest&r ring, the vault of the &aYeti&r is the second Twilight boss to fight.
quest.1E077BC4B8832C98.quest_desc.translation: 出現於&b暮光森林&r環帶較高處的&a雪怪&r寶庫之中，他將會是你要擊敗的第二位暮光頭目。

quest.1F0F37429F1177DF.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of Twilight&r.

Work with them to unlock the &3Twilight Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo twilight&7.
quest.1F0F37429F1177DF.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d暮光族裔之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3暮光升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo twilight&7」。

quest.27439A8D79B21B73.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Ancient&r.

Work with them to learn the secrets of the &dDeep Dark&r to unlock the &3Euphonium Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo ancient&7.
quest.27439A8D79B21B73.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d遠古族裔之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r一同揭開&d深暗之域&r的秘密，並協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3低吟金屬升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo ancient&7」。

quest.30902357747A64F1.quest_desc.original:
With the &2Yeti&r defeated, you will have access to 2 new vaults to find.

Found within the upper levels of the &bTwilight Forest&r ring, you can run into a vault of the &aSnow Queen's Castle&r.
quest.30902357747A64F1.quest_desc.translation:
當你擊敗了&2雪怪首領&r之後，你現在有著兩座全新寶庫能夠探索。

她會出現於&b暮光森林&r環帶較高處的&a冰雪女王城堡&r之中。

quest.32653261B16850B3.quest_desc.original:
Once both the &aSnow Queen&r and the &2Hydra&r have been defeated, there is one final vault that unlocks.

The vault of the &dKnight Phantoms&r will be your final puzzle and fight within the &bTwilight Forest&r ring.
quest.32653261B16850B3.quest_desc.translation:
當&a冰雪女王&r和&2九頭蛇&r雙雙被擊敗之後，最終寶庫已被解鎖。

&d幻影騎士&r寶庫將會是你在&b暮光森林&r環帶中經歷的最後一道謎題和最後一場戰鬥。

quest.37499343396BC372.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.37499343396BC372.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.383DAD591823C746.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.383DAD591823C746.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.3D0CE267A8FD95CD.quest_desc.original:
With the &2Yeti&r defeated, you will have access to 2 new vaults to find.

Found within the lower levels of the &bTwilight Forest&r ring, you can find the &aHydra's Lair Vault&r.

&eNote&r: The &cHydra&r failed to make rent and will not spawn in the world, it exists only in digital format via Data Models.
quest.3D0CE267A8FD95CD.quest_desc.translation:
當你擊敗了&2雪怪首領&r之後，你現在有著兩座全新寶庫能夠探索。

牠會出現於&b暮光森林&r環帶較低處的&a九頭蛇巢穴寶庫&r之中。

&e備註&r：&c九頭蛇&r繳不起房租，所以現在那裡有位新的租客。

quest.3DCD6DC36B31EEF4.quest_desc.original:
With these &3World Engine Upgrades&r installed, you feel as though you are finally starting to master the &6World Engine&r.

Head back to the &dEcho of Guidance&r to see what comes next and unlock even more &6Archives&r!
quest.3DCD6DC36B31EEF4.quest_desc.translation:
當你安裝了這麼多&3世界引擎升級&r之後，你感覺你終於開始精通&6世界引擎&r了。

返回&d指引嚮導之回聲&r處，看看下一步該做什麼，並解鎖更多的&6檔案庫&r吧！

quest.45A3E686E32AB95D.quest_desc.original: Found within the &bTwilight Forest&r ring, the vault of the &aLich&r is the first of five Twilight bosses you need to find.
quest.45A3E686E32AB95D.quest_desc.translation: 出現於&b暮光森林&r環帶的&a巫妖&r寶庫之中，他會是你總共要尋找的五位暮光頭目的第一位。

quest.45BA73F16B7AE681.quest_desc.original:
Found within lower deepslate, the &3Ancient City&r holds a giant portal that can finally be activated, allowing you to defeat the boss within.

Upon entering the portal you will receive a blindness effect that can only be cured by filling your &dSoul Cage&r with mob souls dropped from killing strengthened enemies inside the &3Vault&r.

&cYou must hold the &dSoul Cage &cin your offhand to charge it!

Once you have filled your &dSoul Cage&r, you may start the boss fight by taking the elevator in the starting room.

&eNote&r: Killing mobs with the &6Reaper&r enchantment will fill your Cage quicker (+1 per Level)
quest.45BA73F16B7AE681.quest_desc.translation:
在深板岩環帶的較低處，&3遠古之城&r之中的巨大傳送門終於能夠被點亮，讓你能夠進去擊敗裡面的頭目。

當你進入傳送門之後，你會受到失明效果的影響。只能透過殺死&3寶庫&r內的強大敵人，利用他們的靈魂填滿你的&d靈魂牢籠&r，來逐步減緩失明效果。

&c你必須要將&d靈魂牢籠&c放在你的副手才能收集到靈魂！

當你填滿你的&d靈魂牢籠&r之後，你就可以搭上起始房間之中的電梯開啟頭目戰了。

&e備註&r：使用&6收割者&r附魔殺死怪物能夠讓你的牢籠滿的更快。（每等級 +1）

quest.4B92EBBA1F2BBFEA.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.4B92EBBA1F2BBFEA.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.4BAD7359CF074014.quest_desc.original:
Before you can harness the power of the void, you'll need to create a machine to craft on an atomic level.

The &dAtomic Forge&r is perfect for this, and can craft an ingot strong enough to hold in the void.

&eNote&r: The &dAtomic Forge&r must be powered by the &dEnderic Laser&r.
quest.4BAD7359CF074014.quest_desc.translation:
在你嘗試駕馭虛空之力之前，你需要一台能夠以原子維度進行合成的機器。

&d原子鍛造廠&r就是一台很適合的機器，它能夠合成出一種足以承受虛空的金屬錠。

&e備註&r：&d原子鍛造廠&r必須透過&d終界雷射&r進行充能。

quest.4D6D066B0855586D.quest_desc.original:
Within the Ocean ring, there is a creature that has been touched by the void.

Good luck.

&eNote&r: You will need an &dAbyssal Sacrifice&r to activate the altar. The items required to craft it can be acquired from the &9Coralssus&r &aGateway of Eternity&r.
quest.4D6D066B0855586D.quest_desc.translation:
在海洋環帶之中，有著一隻曾被虛空觸碰過的生物。

祝你好運。

&e備註&r：你會需要一個&d深淵祭品&r才能啟動祭壇。用來合成它的物品能夠透過&9深淵&r&a傳送門珍珠&r獲得。

quest.51B3EF0BCEB804A4.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.51B3EF0BCEB804A4.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.56FB1BC5711CC4F9.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.56FB1BC5711CC4F9.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.586C935010D2FE74.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.586C935010D2FE74.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.5FDB9EC42FE936C6.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.5FDB9EC42FE936C6.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.665C261B98E4D20B.quest_desc.original: Speak to &dTwilight&r once you have returned triumphantly from your adventure so they can show you how to install the &3Twilight World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.665C261B98E4D20B.quest_desc.translation: 當你從這段征程凱旋而歸後，與&d暮光族裔&r談談，他會教你該如何安裝&3暮光世界引擎升級&r。

quest.6781D1A7A53A5F1D.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.6781D1A7A53A5F1D.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.6D0C1811DA909BBD.quest_desc.original:
The &dAncient City Vault&r is filled with loot, but the most important item comes from the boss.

3-4 &bCursium Ingots&r will drop on each kill. These ingots can be transformed into a usable upgrade in the &6World Engine&r.
quest.6D0C1811DA909BBD.quest_desc.translation:
縱使&d遠古之城寶庫&r中有著大量戰利品，但最重要的物品來自於那裡的頭目。

每次殺死牠都會掉落 3~4 個&b咒靈錠&r。\n這種金屬錠能夠被轉化為一項可用於&6世界引擎&r之中的升級。

quest.6F258F4C7BE2EE44.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.6F258F4C7BE2EE44.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.775BE99DF402AF0D.quest_desc.original:
Speak to &dThe Ancient&r once you have returned from the &3Vault&r.

They'll be able to show you how to install the &3Euphonium World Engine Upgrade&r.
quest.775BE99DF402AF0D.quest_desc.translation:
當你從這座&3寶庫&r成功歸來後，與&d遠古族裔&r談話。

他會教你該如何安裝&3低吟金屬世界引擎升級&r。

quest.77DE3D57E5B58948.quest_desc.original:
No &eCompass &rthis time!

Head out to the Ocean Ring and use your &bExplorer's Compass&r to find the Water Orb arena where you can summon the &dLeviathan&r!
quest.77DE3D57E5B58948.quest_desc.translation:
這次沒有&e羅盤&r了！

動身前往海洋環帶，並使用你的&b探索者羅盤&r找到「冥海之珠」競技場以召喚出&d利維坦&r！

task.2B4A71FE904A1A6D.title.translation: 與&d指引嚮導之回聲&r交談
